home.title: JobZapp | High-Speed Job Application Tracker
home.description: Stop tracking in spreadsheets. JobZapp is the high-speed job application tracker designed for the modern market. Manage your career with AI-powered precision.
home.aboutDescription: JobZapp was built to solve the chaos of modern job hunting. We believe that tracking your career should be as fast and precise as the roles you're applying for.

tracking.title: Application Hub
tracking.description: Centralize every application, interview, and offer. Real-time status tracking and automated follow-up reminders.

cv.title: CV Management
cv.description: Store and tailor multiple versions of your CV. AI-assisted keyword optimization for every role.

prep.title: Interview Prep
prep.description: Prepare for every round with structured feedback loops. Record every interaction and stay top-of-mind.

analytics.title: Smart Analytics
analytics.description: Visual insights into your application funnel. Identify bottlenecks and optimize your conversion from application to offer.

automation.title: AI Copilot
automation.description: Automated CV tailoring and interview question generation based on specific job descriptions. (Beta)

calendar.title: Bring Your Own Key (Beta)
calendar.description: Use your own OpenRouter key to power the AI Copilot. Test all AI features securely and directly from your browser.

footer.headline: Built for the modern job market. Accelerate your career with precision tracking.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Everything you need to land your next role, for free.
pricing.betaDescription: AI features are currently in a closed beta. Request access to start tailoring your CVs with AI-powered precision.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | JobZapp
meta.description: We treat your professional data with the highest security. No selling, no prying, just tracking.

hero.subtext: JobZapp is built to help you land your dream job, not to harvest your data. We only store what you need to track your progress.

controller.title: Who We Are
controller.body: JobZapp is operated by Cereja Investment, Lda., registered at Travessa do Girassol, n61 3D, 2775-811 Carcavelos, Portugal. For privacy inquiries: privacy@jobzapp.com

corePromise.title: Our Core Promise
corePromise.noEmail: 📧 We don't sell your contact information.
corePromise.noStorage: 🔒 Your CVs and Job details are private and encrypted at rest.
corePromise.lifetime: You have full control. Delete your account at any time, and every trace of your data is wiped immediately.

dataCollected.title: What We Collect
dataCollected.limited: We collect the data necessary to provide the tracking service:

payment.title: Billing Data
payment.description: Processed entirely by Polar. We store only payment status and basic transaction info.

analytics.title: Usage Analytics
analytics.description: Anonymous data to improve the platform, such as feature usage and page performance.

analytics.title: Product improvement
analytics.description: Helping us identify which features help users land jobs faster.

improvement.title: AI Quality
improvement.description: Improving our CV tailoring and interview prep suggestions.

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis
legalBasis.body: Under GDPR, our legal basis is:
legalBasis.gdpr: Contract fulfillment (providing the service) and legitimate interests.
legalBasis.ccpa: We do not sell your personal information.

thirdParties.title: Third Parties
thirdParties.body: We use trusted partners to power the platform:

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: We use essential session cookies only. No cross-site tracking.

aiQuotas.title: AI Credits & Plans
aiQuotas.description: Manage your AI usage limit and pricing plans.

byok.title: Bring Your Own Key (BYOK)
byok.description: Enter your OpenRouter key to bypass AI Credits and run AI models directly from your browser. Your key is stored securely in your browser's local storage and is never saved to our database.
